matches.title: Is It Too Late To Consider NVIDIA (NVDA) After Recent Share Price Pullback?
matches.text: If you are wondering whether NVIDIA's share price still makes sense after its huge run, or if you are late to the story, this article walks through what the current market price implies about value. The stock last closed at US$180.05, with a 6.6% decline over 7 days, a 5.8% decline over 30 days, a 4.7% decline year to date, and a 55.3% return over 1 year, while the 3 year return is very large and the 5 year return is more than 13x. Recent headlines continue to focus on NVIDIA's central role...
